name: mcp-server-agent-security
description: Audit and remediate AI agent and MCP server security vulnerabilities, prompt injection risk, and data exfiltration paths.

tools.name: audit_mcp_config
tools.description: Static analysis of raw MCP config JSON.

tools.name: audit_mcp_server
tools.description: Active probing of a running MCP server over stdio.

tools.name: audit_prompt_injection
tools.description: Prompt-injection resistance analysis for a system prompt and tool set.

tools.name: audit_agent_dataflow
tools.description: Capability-based PII and exfiltration path tracing.

tools.name: scan_mcp_package
tools.description: npm package scan for dependencies, dangerous patterns, and permission issues.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Combine multiple stored audits into a single executive report.

tools.name: fix_mcp_config
tools.description: Auto-remediate MCP config security issues and return a hardened config.

tools.name: harden_system_prompt
tools.description: Harden a system prompt with injection-resistant guardrails.

tools.name: generate_policy
tools.description: Generate an enforceable JSON security policy from MCP config.
